title: hieracium nigritum subsp. pseudostygium
intro: Hieracium nigritum subsp. pseudostygium, also known as a type of Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like plant genus Hieracium. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. Its health benefits include potential uses in wound healing, and as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant is typically prepared into herbal infusions or tinctures for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
